news.headline: Travel + Leisure Co. (NYSE:TNL) with 19,000 global associates honored as one of America's Most Responsible Companies in 2025 by Newsweek for the third time.
news.summary: Travel + Leisure Co. (NYSE:TNL), a prominent vacation ownership and membership travel firm, with a workforce of 19,000 employees worldwide, has been recognized by Newsweek as one of America’s Most Responsible Companies in 2025. This marks the third occasion that the company has been honored with this accolade since the inception of the America’s Most Responsible Companies list in 2020. Newsweek's ranking of America’s Most Responsible Companies emphasizes a comprehensive evaluation of corporate responsibility.

news.headline: HappyRobot secures $15.6M Series A funding led by a16z to revolutionize logistics with AI.
news.summary: In San Francisco on December 4, 2024, HappyRobot, a company specializing in AI voice technology for the logistics industry, revealed that it had successfully raised $15.6 million in Series A funding. The funding round was spearheaded by Andreessen Horowitz (a16z) and also saw contributions from Y Combinator as well as other strategic investors.

news.headline: Residential Elevators invites you to 2025 IBS in Las Vegas to check out latest innovation in premium home elevator.
news.summary: Residential Elevators is extending an invitation for individuals to attend the NAHB International Builders' Show (IBS) located in Las Vegas, NV from February 25 to 27, 2025. The event will showcase the newest advancements and enhancements to their high-end home elevator collection. This exhibition is recognized as the largest yearly..

news.headline: Healthcare executive killed in NYC on investor day.
American Water (NYSE: AWK) chooses American Red Cross for NYSE's 2024 Global Giving Campaign, supporting charitable organizations.
news.summary: American Water, the leading regulated water and wastewater utility company in the U.S., has chosen the American Red Cross to be honored in the NYSE's 2024 Global Giving Campaign. As the largest regulated utility company in the nation and listed on NYSE under the symbol AWK, American Water will showcase its support for the American Red Cross through this initiative. The American Water Charitable Foundation, a 501(c)(3) organization set up by American Water, will be involved in this campaign. This collaboration aims to raise awareness and highlight the philanthropic efforts of American Water for the American Red Cross, further solidifying their commitment to giving back to the community.

news.headline: Australian asset manager plans to tokenize fixed income fund to simplify management and increase DeFi access.
news.summary: The partnerships aim to streamline asset management by tokenizing traditional financial assets, making them accessible on decentralized finance platforms and broadening DeFi reach.

news.headline: The Maas Clinic in San Francisco to host seminar for women on hormone health and aesthetics, aiming to empower and inspire.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in San Francisco, The Maas Clinic, a prominent provider of plastic surgery services, announced their plan to hold a public educational seminar aimed at motivating and empowering women in their pursuit of overall health and beauty. The event, named 'The Complete Healthy & Beauty Seminar,' will serve as a platform to share valuable insights with attendees.

news.headline: Quantiphi sponsors largest Generative AI Hackathon, named Guinness World Records' "Record Holder".
news.summary: Quantiphi, an AI-first digital engineering company based in Mumbai, India, was recently recognized for participating in the largest generative AI hackathon. The event took place on December 4, 2024, and Quantiphi received a Guinness World Records certificate as a "Record Holder" for their involvement. This achievement highlights the company's commitment to innovation and expertise in the field of artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Arkieva Software chosen by Tata Consumer Products Limited for supply chain planning project.
news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware on December 4, 2024, Arkieva, a top supply chain planning software and consulting firm, revealed a new project with Tata Consumer Products Limited (TCPL), a company in the fast-moving consumer goods industry. TCPL enlisted Arkieva to enhance their supply chain planning.

news.headline: ID.me names Christine Purcell as CMO for continued growth. Purcell, with healthcare experience, to drive business growth.
news.summary: Christine Purcell has been named Chief Marketing Officer (CMO) of ID.me, the top digital identity wallet company based in McLean, Virginia. The appointment was announced on December 4, 2024. Purcell, known for her expertise in crafting strong brands and fostering growth in the healthcare sector, will now spearhead the marketing strategies for ID.me. This move underlines the company's commitment to further enhancing its market position and expanding its reach.

news.headline: Hillsborough County sales surtax settlement receives final approval by court. Deadline to visit www.FLTaxRefund.com before December 31.
news.summary: In Tallahassee, Florida, on December 4, 2024, the Hillsborough County Surtax Settlement Administrator disclosed that on November 18, 2024, Judge John C. Cooper of the Circuit Court of the Second Judicial Circuit in Leon County, Florida finalized an order.

news.headline: Timken Company named one of America's Most Responsible Companies for 5th year in a row by Newsweek and Statista Inc.
news.summary: Ohio-based company Timken (NYSE: TKR) has recently been honored as one of America's Most Responsible Companies for the fifth consecutive year by Newsweek and Statista Inc. Timken, a global leader in engineered bearings and industrial motion, continues to uphold its commitment to corporate responsibility and sustainability. This recognition highlights Timken's dedication to making a positive impact and marks another milestone in their pursuit of excellence.

news.headline: HR professionals are looking to increase their role in business operations post-COVID. Fifth annual survey by MindEdge/HRCI reveals this shift in focus.
news.summary: The fifth annual survey conducted by MindEdge and HRCI reveals that HR has successfully adjusted to the "New Normal" following the pandemic. The survey, conducted in Boston and Alexandria, Va. on December 4, 2024, highlighted HR professionals' desire to increase HR's involvement in their organization's business. This shift in focus comes as a response to the challenges posed by the COVID-19 pandemic.

news.headline: SAE and Joint Office collaborate for universal plug & charge system testing by 2025, simplifying EV charging.
news.summary: A new framework is set to revolutionize the electric vehicle charging experience at public stations by providing seamless and secure service across the industry. The testing of this system is scheduled to commence in 2025 in Troy, Mich., and Washington. This development aims to make electric vehicle charging more accessible and convenient for drivers.

news.headline: 2025 VETS Indexes Employer Awards survey application now open for organizations promoting veteran employment. #VETSIndexes
news.summary: In New York on December 4, 2024, VETS Indexes, a company focused on supporting veteran employment, revealed the launch of the 2025 VETS Indexes Employer Awards survey application. This platform is now open for companies to participate and showcase their contributions. The esteemed awards acknowledge organizations that excel in hiring veterans and promoting their well-being.

news.headline: Lexus unveils "Liminal Cycles" installation with Crafting Plastics, exploring innovation and technology.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas and Miami on December 4th, 2024, Lexus introduced Liminal Cycles, a new installation and limited-edition capsule collection that delve into material innovation, responsive technology, and personalization - all highlights of Lexus' luxury design. This initiative offers a unique exploration of these elements through a captivating multisensory experience.

news.headline: NorthSky Supply in Texas introduces ecommerce with MRO products at competitive prices, aiming for quality and value.
news.summary: In The Woodlands, Texas, a company known as NorthSky is making waves in the market. They provide a wide range of MRO products and industrial supplies, including safety equipment and hand tools, at competitive prices. Customers can enjoy top-notch quality without breaking the bank when shopping at NorthSky.

news.headline: Companies purchasing their own securities will impact their total voting rights. The number of purchased securities will affect the overall voting power.
Disclosure of the transactions in shares of Ringkjøbing Landbobank A/S has been made to various stock exchanges and authorities.
news.summary: The stock exchanges Nasdaq Copenhagen, London Stock Exchange, and Euronext Dublin, along with the Danish Financial Supervisory Authority and other stakeholders, are involved in a collaboration. This collaboration involves important financial regulations and oversight that impact numerous companies and investors in the financial markets. It showcases the significance of cross-border cooperation and regulatory framework harmonization.

news.headline: Vishay Intertechnology introduces MOSFET with 0.34 mΩ RDS(ON), 795 A ID, and 0.21 °C/W RthJC for increased efficiency & power density.
news.summary: A new device boasting a space-saving design incorporates a unique BWL feature and an impressive high ID rating of up to 795 A. This enhancement results in a substantial increase in power density. Additionally, the device showcases a low RthJC value of 0.21 °C/W, significantly improving its thermal performance.

news.headline: Verizon CEO Hans Vestberg speaking at UBS Conference on Dec. 9 at 9:00 a.m. ET. Webcast details on Verizon's IR website.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, Hans Vestberg, Chairman and CEO of Verizon (VZ), is set to address the UBS Global Media & Communications Conference on December 9, at 9:00 a.m. ET. Those interested can watch the webcast of his speech, with details accessible on Verizon’s Investor Relations site: www.verizon.com/about/investors/.

news.headline: Good Day Farm opens largest medical cannabis dispensary in the South in Lake Charles, Louisiana.
news.summary: Good Day Farm has officially opened its new flagship store in Lake Charles, Louisiana, marking a significant milestone for the leading cannabis company. The grand opening took place on December 4, 2024, with much excitement and anticipation. The store is set to become the largest of its kind in the Southern United States, offering a wide range of products and services to cater to the growing demand for cannabis in the region. Good Day Farm's expansion into Louisiana signifies a strategic move to tap into the burgeoning market, with the aim of providing top-quality products to customers. The company's commitment to excellence is evident in the grand scale of the new flagship store, which is poised to attract a large number of consumers.

news.headline: Bitcoin needs to surpass a significant sell wall to reach $100,000, as analysts note increased sell orders and inflows to exchanges.
news.summary: Bitcoin is currently facing a significant obstacle on its way to $100,000 as analysts highlight a surge in sell orders and deposits to exchanges.

news.headline: AUGA group shareholders meeting on Dec 4, 2024: 190,737,910 shares held, 81.58% votes; approved company restructuring plan.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, the Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders of AUGA group, AB convened at Konstitucijos ave. 21C, Vilnius. Shareholders present held 190,737,910 shares, equating to 190,737,910 votes (81.58% of total). During the meeting, shareholders voted in favor of restructuring the Company, endorsing the proposed plan, and granting authority to the board and management to execute the process. The legal entity code of AUGA group, AB is 126264360.

news.headline: South Korea parliament formally introduces motion to impeach President Yoon - Video Footage.
Bitcoin's (BTC) surge boosts Riot Platforms Inc (RIOT) and Marathon Digital Holdings Inc (MARA), achieving a Golden Cross.
news.summary: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has surged over 38% in the last month, sparking a significant rise for cryptocurrency mining companies Riot Platforms Inc (NASDAQ:RIOT) and Marathon Digital Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:MARA). Both firms have witnessed a Golden Cross, a key technical indicator signaling positive market sentiment as the 50-day moving average exceeds the 200-day moving average. Riot Platforms, benefitting from Bitcoin's upswing, has seen a 35% increase in stock value during the same period, rebounding from a challenging year. Currently trading at $12.14, the stock is above its 50-day Simple Moving Average (SMA) of $10.18 and its 200-day SMA of $10.18.

news.headline: Dow Jones, S&P 500, Nasdaq rise, Nvidia in buy zone, Marvell stock surges after earnings. Salesforce, Okta also up.
news.summary: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq all saw gains in the stock market. Nvidia's stock is currently in a favorable buy zone, and Marvell experienced a significant jump in its stock value today. The rise in the Dow Jones was influenced by Salesforce's performance, while companies like Okta and Marvell surged after announcing positive earnings reports.

news.headline: Community pharmacies need to adopt medical billing tech for higher margins & clinical services. Reported on Dec. 4, 2024, in Madison, Wisconsin.
news.summary: A former NIH official has detailed the pharmaceutical industry's need to shift towards high-margin, pharmacist-driven clinical services through the use of medical billing software. This call for transformation was made in Madison, Wisconsin on December 4, 2024. Workflow Services, a comprehensive software solution, was highlighted as a key tool in enabling this transition.

news.headline: Grey Goose Altius partners with MSCHF for A.I.R. Chateau in Miami, featuring boundary-defying art.
news.summary: With influence drawn from GREY GOOSE Altius, a recently launched ultra-premium vodka embodying the brand's dedication to excellence, the A.I.R. Chateau is set to exhibit groundbreaking creations representing its commitment to craftsmanship. Situated amidst the clouds of the French Alps, where its pristine water source can be found, this exclusive venue will host innovative works at the pinnacle of their artistry. The event will take place in HAMILTON, Bermuda, with attendees expected to witness a showcase of unparalleled talent and creativity.

news.headline: Trump: I asked Michael Whatley to return as lead of the Republican National Committee.
Trump: Peter Navarro will serve as my Senior Counselor for Trade and Manufacturing.
Moringa Extract Market to reach $10.65 billion by 2031. News report by Meticulous Research.
news.summary: In Redding, California on December 4, 2024, a recent market research report was released regarding the Moringa Extract Market. The report covers various types of Moringa extracts including Leaf, Seed, Bark, and Root extracts, available in forms such as Powder and Liquid. The applications of these extracts span across industries such as Food & Beverage, Cosmetics, and more. The report is comprehensive, providing insights and analysis on market trends, market share, growth rates, and forecasts. This extensive report serves as a valuable resource for businesses and individuals interested in the Moringa extract market.

news.headline: Ethereum outperforms Bitcoin and Solana in November, but still lags behind. Potential turnaround predicted by 2025.
news.summary: In the current month, Ethereum has shown significant growth compared to Bitcoin (BTC) and Solana (SOL), with its performance outpacing both. Despite this recent uptick, Ethereum is still lagging behind in terms of overall performance. Looking ahead, experts predict that Ethereum may experience a turnaround by the year 2025.

news.headline: South Korea ruling party decides to oppose Yoon impeachment - Yonhap.
Oroco's 2024 AGM update impacted by Canada Post strike, Meeting Materials available online, meeting on Dec 12, 2024.
news.summary: Vancouver-based Oroco Resource Corp. (TSXV: OCO; OTCQB: ORRCF, BF: OR6) has revealed that the ongoing Canada Post strike has impacted the delivery of information circular and related materials for its upcoming Annual General Meeting scheduled for December 12, 2024. To ensure shareholders have access to the necessary Meeting Materials, Oroco has posted them on www.sedarplus.ca and the company's website at www.orocoresourcecorp.com/investors/agm-materials/. Although the materials have been sent by mail, the Postal Strike may result in potential delays, prompting shareholders to retrieve the Meeting Materials from the specified websites.

news.headline: Dassault Systèmes announces total outstanding shares and voting rights as of November 30, 2024.
US services sector growth slows more than expected in Nov, Services PMI drops to 52.1% from 56% in Oct, missing expected 55.5%. Businesses cautious of tariffs and election impact.
news.summary: Last month, the growth of the U.S. services sector unexpectedly slowed down as concerns over the economic impact of recent elections and impending tariffs surfaced. The Services Purchasing Managers Index dropped to 52.1% in November from its two-year high of 56% in October. This decrease missed the anticipated decline to 55.5%. The data was reported by the Institute for Supply Management. Steve Miller, chair of the ISM Services Business Survey Committee, attributed the November decline to decreases in Business Activity, New Orders, Employment, and Supplier Deliveries subindexes. The Services PMI index for November reveals a concerning trend in the sector, according to the ISM report.

news.headline: CFGI appoints Justin Femmer as Chief Revenue Officer to enhance growth and market expansion. Former PwC partner with 18 years experience.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in Boston, a leading global independent accounting and business advisory firm, CFGI, disclosed the addition of Justin Femmer as Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). Previously a partner at PwC, Justin comes with a solid 18 years of experience. CFGI, which is under the ownership of Carlyle and CVC, made this significant change to bolster its leadership team.

news.headline: Q3 2024 Global Oil & Gas Industry Contracts Review: $35.7 billion total value, 1,519 contracts signed. Saipem boosts upstream activities significantly.
news.summary: In the latest report from ResearchAndMarkets.com, the "Q3 2024 Global Oil & Gas Industry Contracts Review" highlights significant developments, including Saipem's notable increase in upstream contract activity. The global oil and gas sector experienced a 35% decrease in total disclosed contract value from $55.3 billion in Q2 2024 to $35.7 billion in Q3 2024. Despite this drop, the number of contracts remained steady, with 1,519 contracts in Q3 2024 compared to 1,546 in Q2 2024. The report offers in-depth analysis of these trends and their implications.

news.headline: Live updates from DealBook Summit: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman discusses AI threat. Next up: Serena Williams. Jerome Powell, Jeff Bezos, Bill Clinton and Sundar Pichai to speak.
news.summary: Tennis legend Serena Williams is scheduled to have a discussion with Andrew Ross Sorkin in the near future. Notable figures such as Jerome Powell, Jeff Bezos, Bill Clinton, and Sundar Pichai are also expected to participate in upcoming conversations.

news.headline: Former Independent Counsel Robert Ray joins Sterlington PLLC, bringing expertise in high-profile investigations, focusing on white-collar defense.
news.summary: Sterlington PLLC, based in New York, revealed that Robert W. Ray, the ex-independent counsel following Kenneth Starr, has joined the firm as a partner. Ray, known for spearheading notable public corruption probes like the Monica Lewinsky case and the FBI files controversy, will concentrate on white-collar criminal defense and internal investigations in his new role. Described as one of the leading American attorneys of the 21st century, Ray's addition to the firm marks a significant move.

news.headline: TeraWulf (NASDAQ: WULF) stock rising as they mined 115 Bitcoins in November with an average cost of $41,190 per Bitcoin. Maintained 8.4 EH/s of capacity, up 68% YoY.
news.summary: TeraWulf Inc (NASDAQ:WULF) saw an increase in shares on Wednesday following the announcement of a production and operations update for November. The company mined a total of 115 Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) during the month, with an average daily production rate of around 3.8 bitcoin. The average power cost per bitcoin mined was reported to be $41,190. TeraWulf maintained a self-mining capacity of 8.4 EH/s throughout November, showing a 68% increase compared to the previous year. However, the average hash rate for the month was noted to be 5.9 EH/s due to planned outages for electrical upgrades. This update marks a significant milestone for TeraWulf as they continue to enhance their mining operations.

news.headline: MariMed Inc. reports Q3 2024 results with an 18-20% decline in EBITDA, but raises sales guidance by 6-8%. aligns with projections from Zuanic & Associates.
news.summary: MariMed Inc. (NASDAQ: MRMD) reported Q3 2024 results on November 6, with revised guidance for the fiscal year. EBITDA is expected to decline by 18-20%, down from the previous forecast of flat to 2% growth, while sales guidance was raised to a 6-8% increase, up from 5-7%. These adjustments closely match expectations from industry research firm Zuanic & Associates. MariMed's strategic focus on core markets like Illinois was highlighted in the report, reflecting sector trends despite the EBITDA decrease. Zuanic's team visited MariMed's operations in Illinois, noting new kitchen/lab facilities. Full details are available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: BizClik Media launches December editions of Sustainability & Energy Digital Magazines with interviews from Shell, Dassault Systèmes, GE, and more.
news.summary: In the latest December issues of Sustainability and Energy Digital Magazines, readers can find exclusive interviews with top professionals and executives representing companies such as Shell, Dassault Systèmes, GE, and others. Released on December 4, 2024, in London, these editions are the product of BizClik, a rapidly expanding publishing firm based in the UK. Stay informed with insights from industry leaders in these publications.

news.headline: Janice Bryant Howroyd, CEO of ACT One Group, to lead master class on Sustaining Excellence. National Utilities Diversity Council event. Los Angeles, Dec. 4, 2024.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in Los Angeles, the National Utilities Diversity Council (NUDC) revealed that Janice Bryant Howroyd, renowned as the Founder and CEO of ACT One Group and a prominent entrepreneur and speaker in the country, will conduct a master class focused on Sustaining Excellence. This initiative aims to provide valuable insights to participants leveraging Janice's exceptional expertise.

news.headline: Hearst Media Production Group launching new series "Extraordinary World with Jeff Corwin" on CBS, premiering Jan 4.
news.summary: Beginning on January 4, the highly anticipated show "Extraordinary World with Jeff Corwin" will debut on weekend mornings. The premiere is brought to viewers by Hearst Media Production Group (HMPG). This original series is a result of a unique collaboration with The Brady...

news.headline: Investors push for traceability in seafood supply chains, engaging with $6.5 trillion worth of assets to mitigate risks.
news.summary: In London, the FAIRR Initiative released results of a unique investor engagement focusing on seafood companies' ability to trace origins of wild-caught and farmed seafood and aquaculture feed ingredients they acquire. With backing from 35 investors holding a total of US $6.5 trillion in assets, such as Nomura Asset Management and DNB Asset Management, the effort targets material business risks related to inadequate supply chain transparency.

news.headline: Live updates from DealBook Summit: Sam Altman, OpenAI CEO, discusses AI future. Serena Williams up next with Andrew Ross Sorkin. More speakers scheduled.
news.summary: Upcoming speaker Serena Williams, a top tennis player, is scheduled to engage in a discussion with Andrew Ross Sorkin. Future speakers at the event include Jerome Powell, Jeff Bezos, Bill Clinton, and Sundar Pichai.

news.headline: Upland Altify, powered by Altify MaxAI (Nasdaq: UPLD), enhances sales productivity with AI-enabled solutions for account planning & deal management.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Upland Software, Inc. (Nasdaq: UPLD) unveiled the integration of Altify MaxAI into Upland Altify, revolutionizing sales productivity through advanced account planning and deal management software. Altify, known for simplifying intricate sales processes, aims to enhance efficiency and performance for sales professionals. This move solidifies Upland's position as a key player in AI-driven cloud software for digital transformation.

news.headline: AirX Climate Solutions, Inc. has acquired Powrmatic USA, a specialty HVAC designer and manufacturer. Oklahoma City, Dec. 4, 2024.
news.summary: In Oklahoma City on December 4, 2024, AirX Climate Solutions, Inc. (ACS), a prominent specialist in HVAC solutions, revealed the acquisition of Powrmatic USA, a top designer and manufacturer in the HVAC industry. The move marks a significant development in the sector as ACS aims to expand its capabilities with Powrmatic's expertise in providing cooling and heating solutions. The deal showcases ACS's strategic approach to growth and positioning in the market, signaling its intent to capitalize on the increasing demand for HVAC services. This acquisition reinforces ACS's position within the industry, leveraging Powrmatic's established reputation and experience to enhance its services and offerings.
